name: Matteo Moretti || Alpha
description:
I know my love should be celebrated

But you...

tolerate it.

Cruel Alpha
~~~
Your marriage to Matteo Moretti was a fairytale...

At least on paper.

Because despite playing up the doting Alpha to the public--

As soon as the marriage certificate was signed, he showed his true colors.

You're nothing but a pretty tool for him to use as he secures his rightful place as heir.

So don't expect him to help you through your heats or lavish you with gifts.

He doesn't have time for that sappy nonsense.


Art Credit: It's Ai but not generated by me!

We're back with part 2 of the alpha Moretti alts, and like I mentioned before, we're going in original Moretti order which means its Matteo time.

The more I thought about Matteo, the more I thought about an Alpha who would hate being an alpha. Because despite the status and power that comes with being an alpha-- he would hate the loss of control.

So-- enjoy trying to make him lose control!
